pages.title: About GPSSA
pages.markdown:
# About GPSSA

The General Pension and Social Security Authority administers pension and social security schemes for UAE nationals in the government and private sectors.

## Mandate

GPSSA is responsible for registration, contribution collection, benefit calculation and payment, and member services across covered schemes.

pages.title: Laws & Regulations
pages.markdown:
# Laws & Regulations

Federal legislation and Cabinet resolutions establish GPSSA’s authority over pension entitlements, contribution rates, and benefit formulas.

Key instruments include the Federal Pension Law and subsequent amendments governing coverage classes and retirement ages.

pages.title: Services Overview
pages.markdown:
# Services

GPSSA delivers registration, contribution inquiry, end-of-service benefits, retirement pensions, survivor benefits, and digital self-service via portal and mobile channels.

pages.title: Digital & Customer Experience
pages.markdown:
# Digital & Customer Experience

GPSSA continues to expand digital channels, reduce bureaucracy, and align service quality with UAE Global Star Rating expectations.

pages.title: Governance
pages.markdown:
# Governance

Board oversight, executive management, and internal control frameworks guide GPSSA’s administration of social insurance schemes.
